     the Fermi energy is    -0.3211 ev

!    total energy              =   -5914.32448173 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          9.0E-10 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.05242829 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =   -5914.27205344 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -122530.79244046 Ry
     hartree contribution      =   61804.82172979 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -2050.56169048 Ry
     ewald contribution        =   56863.85465261 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -1.59430491 Ry
